associativeOnly: Pseudotime ordering is a statistical construct, not a time-resolved developmental claim
Branch points represent transcriptomic bifurcations, not fate commitments
requiresEvidence: Any lineage claim must cite the trajectory tool, root-selection criterion, and bootstrap stability metric
Cross-condition trajectory comparisons must cite the integration method used upstream
